name: QLM Life & Medical Insurance Company Q.P.S.C.
summary: QLM Life & Medical Insurance Company Q.P.S.C. provides life and medical insurance services in Qatar and internationally. It operates in two segments, Medical, and Group and Credit Life Insurance. The company was incorporated in 2018 and is based in Doha, Qatar. QLM Life & Medical Insurance Company Q.P.S.C. is a subsidiary of Qatar Insurance Company Q.S.P.C.
